instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: Accept admin role (second step). Must be signed by the pending admin.

instructions.name: admin_register_user
docs: Admin register a user (admin only)

instructions.name: claim_dlmm_fees
docs: Claim trading fees from a DLMM position. Pure CPI forwarder — TVL
must be reconciled afterwards via `update_tvl`.

instructions.name: claim_referral_earnings
docs: Claim accumulated referral earnings

instructions.name: close_dlmm_position
docs: Close a DLMM position and remove liquidity via Meteora (CPI)

accounts.name: vault_usdc_account
docs: Vault USDC PDA — used to measure USDC recovered from the closed
position for logging (TVL still reconciles via `update_tvl`).

instructions.name: close_dlmm_position_account
docs: Close a DLMM position account (admin only, must be already closed)

instructions.name: close_pda_token_account
docs: Close a PDA-owned token account and return rent to admin (must have zero balance)

accounts.name: token_account
docs: The token account owned by globalConfigPda to close.
Must have zero balance.

instructions.name: close_user_account
docs: Close an empty user account (user or admin)

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Deposit USDC and receive vault shares

instructions.name: distribute_accrued_fees
docs: Permissionless fee sweep: atomically pay out every accrued fee bucket
(company + 3 devs + marketer1) to their configured wallets and zero
the counters. Anyone can sign `payer`; `token::authority` constraints
pin each destination so a caller cannot redirect funds.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Just pays tx fees / compute. No privilege beyond signing.

instructions.name: flag_user
docs: Flag a user account (admin only)

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the vault with admin and dev wallets

instructions.name: jupiter_swap
docs: Swap USDC ↔ any token via Jupiter

accounts.name: jupiter_program
docs: Should match JUPITER_V6_PROGRAM_ID

accounts.name: source_token_account
docs: This should be the token account we're swapping FROM

instructions.name: jupiter_swap_v2
docs: Swap via Jupiter V2 — uses remaining_accounts for CPI metas.
Automatically transfers tokens between vault PDAs and standard ATAs
that Jupiter expects.

accounts.name: jupiter_source_ata
docs: The PDA's standard ATA for the input mint (where Jupiter expects source tokens).
Tokens are transferred here from source_token_account before the swap.

accounts.name: jupiter_destination_ata
docs: The PDA's standard ATA for the output mint (where Jupiter deposits output tokens).
Tokens are transferred from here to destination_token_account after the swap.

instructions.name: open_dlmm_position
docs: Open a DLMM position via Meteora (CPI)

accounts.name: dlmm_position
docs: DLMM position metadata owned by this program. The PDA derivation
is `["dlmm_position", [position_index]]`.

accounts.name: vault_usdc_account
docs: Vault USDC PDA — used to diff balance pre/post CPI and mark TVL
down by the amount of USDC deployed into the Meteora position.

instructions.name: propose_new_admin
docs: Propose a new admin (first step of two-step rotation). `Some(pk)` sets
the pending admin; `None` cancels an in-flight proposal.

instructions.name: register
docs: Register a new user with optional referrer

instructions.name: set_company_wallet
docs: Set company wallet

instructions.name: set_dev_wallet
docs: Set dev wallet (each dev can only set their own)

instructions.name: set_marketer_wallet
docs: Set marketer wallet (marketer can only set their own)

instructions.name: unflag_user
docs: Unflag a user account (admin only)

instructions.name: update_tvl
docs: Update TVL to reflect actual vault value (admin only, max 20% decrease per call)

instructions.name: update_vault_config
docs: Update global configuration (admin only). Admin rotation is NOT
included here — see `propose_new_admin` / `accept_admin`.

instructions.name: welcome_bonus_deposit
docs: Deposit welcome bonus for a new user

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Withdraw shares, deduct fees, and distribute

instructions.name: withdraw_company_fees
docs: Withdraw company fees

instructions.name: withdraw_dev_fees
docs: Withdraw dev fees

instructions.name: withdraw_marketer_fees
docs: Withdraw marketer fees

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: Unauthorized: Only admin can perform this action

errors.name: UnauthorizedDev
errors.msg: Unauthorized: Only dev can perform this action

errors.name: InvalidDevWalletUpdate
errors.msg: Dev can only update their own wallet

errors.name: UserFlagged
errors.msg: User account is flagged and cannot perform this operation

errors.name: InvalidFeeDistribution
errors.msg: Invalid fee distribution: total must be 100%

errors.name: InvalidReferralDistribution
errors.msg: Invalid referral distribution: total must be 100%

errors.name: TokenAccountNotEmpty
errors.msg: Token account must have zero balance before closing

errors.name: TvlDecreaseTooLarge
errors.msg: TVL decrease exceeds maximum allowed per update (20%)

errors.name: TvlIncreaseTooLarge
errors.msg: TVL increase exceeds maximum allowed per update (50%)

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Signer does not match the pending admin

errors.name: ExceedsMaxTvl
errors.msg: Deposit would exceed global max TVL

errors.name: ExceedsMaxUserShares
errors.msg: Deposit would exceed per-user share cap

errors.name: NothingToDistribute
errors.msg: Nothing to distribute: all fee buckets are zero

errors.name: BelowMinDistribution
errors.msg: Total accrued fees are below the configured minimum distribution amount

types.name: DlmmAccountMeta
docs: Compact representation of DLMM AccountMeta for CPI.

types.name: DlmmCpiData
docs: Full DLMM CPI payload (accounts + raw instruction data).
Built off-chain using Meteora's DLMM SDK and passed in so we can
forward the CPI on-chain.

types.name: DlmmMode
docs: DLMM position mode

types.name: DlmmPosition
docs: DLMM Position Account - tracks a single DLMM position

fields.name: paused
docs: Emergency pause flag — gates deposit / withdraw / claim_referral_earnings.

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Two-step admin rotation: proposed next admin. Cleared on accept.

fields.name: max_tvl
docs: Soft cap on global TVL (0 = disabled). Deposit reverts if exceeded.

fields.name: max_user_shares
docs: Soft cap on per-user shares (0 = disabled). Deposit reverts if exceeded.

fields.name: min_distribution_amount
docs: Total accrued-fees threshold below which `distribute_accrued_fees`
reverts (anti-dust for the permissionless sweep). 0 = disabled.

fields.name: last_distribution_at
docs: Unix timestamp of the most recent successful `distribute_accrued_fees`.
0 if never. Surface for off-chain monitoring / staleness alerts.

types.name: JupiterSwapData
docs: Full Jupiter swap payload (accounts + raw instruction data).
The client is responsible for:
- Calling Jupiter's quote + swap-instructions APIs
- Converting the returned `Instruction` accounts + data into this struct
- Ensuring that all `pubkey`s here correspond to the accounts passed to
this instruction (explicit accounts + `remaining_accounts`)

types.name: SwapAccountMeta
docs: Compact representation of Jupiter's required AccountMeta for CPI.
This is constructed off-chain from Jupiter's `/swap-instructions` response
and passed into the program so we can rebuild the exact `Instruction`.
